tasks.description: Bulk reorder tasks using fractional index

body.updates: Array<{id: string, task_order: number, list_id?: string, status?: string}>

events.name: task.assigned
events.client_action: invalidate assignees.byTask, notify user if assigned to self

flows.name: Create Task
steps: WebSocket task.created emitted to all assignees

flows.name: Set Due Date
steps: If due_date in past: overdue_status=true computed
Schedule reminder via Redis if none set

flows.name: Complete Task
steps: Check if all checklist items done (warn if incomplete checklist)

computed_fields.formula: due_date < TODAY() AND status NOT IN [done, archived]
COUNT(tasks WHERE status IN [todo, in_progress, review] AND is_archived=false)

domain_rules.api_guard: Count parent chain depth, reject if >= 3
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable 'Add subtask' button when at max depth

domain_rules.rule: Completed tasks cannot be re-opened without explicit action
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 409 if status→todo/in_progress from done without re-open flag
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show 'Re-open task' CTA instead of status dropdown

domain_rules.rule: Reminder must be in future at time of creation
Task order uses fractional index for O(1) reordering
domain_rules.api_guard: Use midpoint algorithm for new positions, renormalize when gap < epsilon
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Optimistic reorder on drag-drop via boardStore

domain_rules.rule: Archived lists cannot receive new tasks
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Filter out archived lists from ListSelector

generation_rules: KanbanBoard uses boardStore drag state via DnD Kit with fractional task_order for reordering
Fractional task_order uses midpoint algorithm; renormalize when gap < 0.001
ChecklistEditor shows completion percentage in header using computed Task.completion_percentage
Reminders scheduled via Redis queue (bull/bullmq), processed by background worker
All forms use React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
Every mutation hook implements onMutate (optimistic), onError (rollback), onSettled (invalidate)
Authenticated requests attach JWT from authStore via Axios interceptor
WebSocket events handled in global SocketProvider with per-event invalidation
CalendarView uses calendarStore for view mode and selected date

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
